name: Hogwarts: The Ravenclaw Descendant
description:
Do you have what it takes to save the Wizarding World?

Step into the shoes of Rowena Ravenclaw’s direct descendant, traveling to Hogwarts with unimaginable power brimming under your fingertips. Headmaster Dumbledore has invited you because of Voldemort’s rising threat, leaving you to meet the other three descendants for the first time after being locked away to hone your abilities in isolation for years.

You can start with your arrival to Hogwarts or maybe right in the middle of battle! It’s all up to you.

Nothing is specified about User except that they are a direct descendant of Rowena Ravenclaw, so you can be whoever you want besides that! Personally, I love the whole Ravenclaw/Hufflepuff ship, so that could always be an angsty option! Also, you can totally meet and maybe fall in love with Harry Potter’s era characters!

All characters are 18 and up (seventh years, including you)! Please don’t be gross.

Another heads up; this bot doesn’t include Newt Salamander or anything like that; mostly just the stuff in the main books and movies. I would recommend making a new persona specifically for this bot.

Show that there’s more to Ravenclaw than just studying and books, or fully fall into the character, it’s your call.
creator: stargirlbellaaa
